name: skills-palette
description: A button in the Claude Code panel that opens a categorized palette of your Skills Hub skills and links any of them into the current project in one click.

commands.title: Skills Palette: Add button to Claude panel (inject)
Skills Palette: Remove button from Claude panel

skillsPalette.autoInject.description: Automatically add the Skills Palette button to the Claude Code panel on startup and re-add it after Claude updates.

skillsPalette.reinjectCheckHours.description: How often (hours) to re-check/re-add the button after Claude Code updates (0 = disabled).

scripts.test: node test/injector.test.js && node test/hubReader.test.js && node test/linker.test.js && node test/webviewPalette.test.js
